include_contents none

search and tool lifecycle SSE
provider-attributed source cards

div.style: color: rgb(16, 42, 67) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Cloud worker receives only:
minimized query
Never receives:
user or conversation ID, history,
personal memory, image bytes,
MCP credentials or execution authority
